creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Seems done:

grep -n lumina /usr/local/bin/xdg-open
403:           DE=lumina
438:           DE=lumina
456:      elif [ -x "/usr/local/bin/lumina-open" ]; then DE=lumina;
696:open_lumina()
698:  lumina-open "$1"
968:    lumina)
969:    open_lumina "$url"

I think could closed.
